summary: Completed frontend testing of Simple Football stat-tracking mode at /demo/football/simple. All 12 features tested and working correctly. This is a demo mode designed for broadcasters with minimal clicks and large buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: SimpleFootballLiveGame.jsx is well-structured with proper component separation (QuickScoreButton, TeamScoreCard, GameClock, QuickStatsPanel, EventLog)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Undo functionality properly saves state snapshots (up to 20 history items)
Safety scoring correctly adds points to OTHER team as per football rules
Clock auto-stops at 0:00 with toast notification
seed_data_creation: Demo mode uses static initial data (Central Wolves vs Riverside Panthers)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simple Football mode is a frontend-only demo at /demo/football/simple. All features working: scoring buttons (TD +6, XP +1, 2PT +2, FG +3, Safety +2 to other team), possession toggle, clock controls, quarter change, yards dialogs, first down, turnover, timeouts, undo, and game log.

page_load.notes: Page loads with demo banner, team names (Central Wolves vs Riverside Panthers), initial scores 0-0

tests: TD button adds +6 points to team with possession
XP button adds +1 point to team with possession
2PT button adds +2 points to team with possession
FG button adds +3 points to team with possession
Safety button adds +2 points to OTHER team (correct football rule)

possession_indicator.notes: Yellow ring around team card shows possession, 'POSSESSION' badge visible

possession_toggle.notes: Clicking 'Give Ball' button on team card changes possession, scoring section updates to show new team

tests: Start/Stop button toggles clock running state

quarter_change.notes: Up arrow increases quarter (1st->2nd->3rd->4th->OT), down arrow decreases quarter

pass_yards_dialog.notes: Opens dialog with number input and quick-select buttons (+5, +10, +15, +20, +25, +30, +40, +50, -2, -5, -10, -15)

rush_yards_dialog.notes: Opens dialog with same interface as pass yards, updates rush yards in stats panel

first_down_button.notes: Increments first downs counter for team with possession

turnover_button.notes: Switches possession to other team and increments turnovers for team that lost ball

timeout_buttons.notes: Each team has 3 timeouts, button shows remaining count, stops clock when used

undo_button.notes: Reverts last action, restores previous state including scores, possession, stats, timeouts

game_log.notes: Shows all events with quarter indicator (1Q, 2Q, etc.) and description

mocked_api_note: DEMO MODE - This is a frontend-only demo with no backend API calls. Stats are not persisted.
